extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD attacked on Hautacam with van Aert's early breakaway sacrificing green jersey energy to soften Jumbo's workload before final climb
tactical_patterns: van Aert attacked from gun in green jersey forcing peloton chase, burning rivals before Hautacam to aid Vingegaard
Bardet used DSM teammate complete early breakaway work then dropped back, replicating previous stage's pacing pattern successfully
POGACAR isolated without teammates on final climb while Jumbo-Visma controlled multiple breakaway phases reducing his tactical options

rider_signals.van Aert Wout: negative: attacked immediately from start in green jersey but dropped on second-to-last climb, suggesting declining mountain form
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: finished 42 seconds down and showed visible pain within final kilometer, first time distress visible on face
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: moved into podium position but gained time through others' losses rather than attacking strength
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: DSM teammate did early breakaway work then Bardet paced himself perfectly, replicating Stage 17 conservation tactics
rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: attacked near finish for time gains showing recovery ability after earlier struggles in Pyrenees
